summary_raw: Last upgrade: Morgan Stanley raised price target to $262 on January 28, 2026. Last downgrade: Freedom Broker lowered price target on October 22, 2025. As of April 21, 2026: 19-analyst consensus Buy. Breakdown: 13 Buy, 11 Hold, 1 Sell. Average price target $238.63. HSBC high target $280 on March 17, 2026.
